patch.value: Scaffolder emits TypeScript: index.ts + tsconfig.json + build script, compiled ./index.js entry

Rewrite src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts to generate TypeScript source: index.ts (typed activate/deactivate + capability surfaces importing types from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk), tsconfig.json compiling to ./index.js, and a package.json build script (tsc) + devDependency on typescript. The manifest entry stays ./index.js (compiled output). Mirror the first-party packages/pm-* layout. Keep the colocated sample test as index.test.ts. Update SCAFFOLD_* constants, README bullets/sections, and the define*-builder snippet to TypeScript. 100% line + docstring coverage.

value.note: next_steps build-first hint for TS scaffold
TS scaffold assertions + derive compiled index.js

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text:
Manual compile test (scaffold a package per capability, symlink the SDK + @types/node, run tsc, then node --test) caught three real defects the JS scaffold never had to satisfy — none were caught by unit tests (which assert generated content, not compilation):

1. `outDir: "."` → TS18003 "No inputs were found". tsc auto-EXCLUDES its own outDir, so an in-package outDir excludes the whole package root, leaving the `*.ts` includes unmatched and emitting nothing. Fix: drop outDir entirely and emit beside the source (mirrors first-party packages/pm-*).

2. `node:test` / `node:assert` → TS2591 "Cannot find name … Do you need to install type definitions for node?". The colocated index.test.ts needs Node's ambient types. Fix: add `@types/node` (^20, the engines floor) to scaffold devDependencies AND set `"types": ["node"]` in the tsconfig (auto @types discovery did not pick up node: builtins under NodeNext in the validation harness).

3. search sample fixtures → TS2740: `settings: {}` is typed `PmSettings` and the document `metadata` is `ItemMetadata`; minimal stubs fail strict TS. The importer for-test helper is ergonomic (all-optional + defaults) but the search/vector for-test helpers take the full context. Fix in the generated sample: `settings: {} as PmSettings` + `documents: [...] as ItemDocument[]` with imported types and an explanatory comment. FOLLOW-UP (pm-ax7z sibling): make the search/vector *ForTest context options ergonomic like the importer helper to remove these casts from every generated search test.

Validation: all four capabilities (commands/hooks/search/importers) now compile with tsc rc=0, emit index.js + index.test.js, and pass `node --test` (4/6/6/6 tests, 0 failures).

patch.value: pm extension/package init emits index.ts + tsconfig.json (NodeNext, types:[node], no outDir) + build/test scripts + @types/node; manifest entry stays compiled ./index.js. Manual compile+node:test verified for all 4 capabilities.
